description: Phishing templates impersonating package delivery and shipping companies

templates.name: DHL Package Delivery
suggested_subject_lines: DHL: Your shipment is on its way
Shipment notification: Package awaiting delivery confirmation
DHL Express: Delivery attempted — reschedule required
templates.notes: Highest click-rate category. Nearly universal — works across all employee levels.

templates.name: Package Pickup Notice
suggested_subject_lines: Package ready for pickup — confirm your details
Delivery: Your package is waiting at the facility
Final notice: Package will be returned if not claimed
